title: LIVE NOW! Europe’s competitiveness in emerging technologies – What is the role of standards, markets and quantum innovation? [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: Europe’s ability to compete globally increasingly depends on how effectively it can develop, scale and deploy advanced technologies that drive productivity and long term growth. As competition intensifies in high technology sectors, EU policymakers and stakeholders are examining how Europe can convert strong research capabilities into commercially viable innovation, while ensuring that emerging technologies contribute […]
